title: Changelog
subtitle: Track all updates, improvements, and new features
description: A comprehensive history of all changes made to the Air Canada Strike Tracker

1.1.0.title: Enhanced Navigation & User Experience
1.1.0.summary: Complete navigation overhaul with mobile-first design and improved accessibility

changes.description: Mobile-responsive hamburger menu with organized sections
Desktop collapsible navigation with categorized content
Improved accessibility with proper ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
Enhanced mobile experience with touch-friendly interface
Quick navigation shortcuts for key sections

1.0.1.title: Content Enhancement & Context
1.0.1.summary: Added detailed explanations and context for strike impact calculations

changes.description: Detailed unpaid hours explanation with flight attendant work context
Safety implications coverage in strike analysis
Enhanced transparency in loss calculation methodology

1.0.0.title: Initial Launch
1.0.0.summary: Full launch of Air Canada Strike Tracker with comprehensive features

changes.description: Real-time strike tracking with projected financial losses
Breaking news banner system with live updates
Interactive timeline of strike events and milestones
Comprehensive strike analysis with economic impact
Source verification system with credible news outlets
Resource center with external links and documentation
Responsive design optimized for all devices
